assets.description: First-quarter Moon, craters sharp along the terminator, black sky background. Synthetic placeholder asset.
Jupiter as a bright disk with four small moons in a line beside it, eyepiece view framing. Synthetic placeholder asset.
Wide low-power view of the Orion Nebula in the sword of Orion, faint greenish glow. Synthetic placeholder asset.
The Pleiades open cluster, a tight dipper of blue-white stars filling a low-power field. Synthetic placeholder asset.
The Acme Cosmos ST-1 tabletop reflector set up on a picnic table at dusk, red-dot finder visible. Synthetic product placeholder asset.
App screenshot mock of the 'tonight' feed top card suggesting one object to point at. Synthetic placeholder asset; no embedded marketing copy baked into the frame.
